programme.title: Families Like Ours
programme.desc: 1/2. Each passing day brings Laura and Elias closer together. 2024. Director: Thomas Vinterberg. Starring: Amaryllis April Maltha August, Albert Rudbeck Lindhardt.

programme.desc: 1/3. As Denmark sinks, angry workers storm the estate looking to get paid. 2024. Denmark. Director: Thomas Vinterberg. Starring: Amaryllis April Maltha August, Albert Rudbeck Lindhardt.

programme.desc: 1/4. Laura says her goodbyes to Fanny and begins a quest of her own. 2024. Denmark. Director: Thomas Vinterberg. Starring: Imad Abul-Foul, Amaryllis April Maltha August.

programme.desc: 1/6. Comforted by her reunion with Fanny, Laura still fears that she will never see Elias again. 2024. Denmark. Director: Thomas Vinterberg. Starring: Tourialay Akbari, Marcela Andrei.

programme.title: Families Like Ours
programme.desc: 1/7. Laura builds a new life in Bucharest, though her family and friends are sorely missed. 2024. Denmark. Director: Thomas Vinterberg. Starring: Tourialay Akbari, Marianna Arzumanova.
